successCriteria.description: src/modules/employee/employee.service.ts exists and exports IEmployeeService, EmployeeService, and EmployeeFilters
src/modules/employee/employee.routes.ts exists and exports employeeRoutes function
src/shared/middleware/rbac.ts exists and exports requireRoles middleware
tests/unit/modules/employee/employee.service.test.ts exists and contains Jest tests for all EmployeeService methods
tests/unit/modules/employee/employee.controller.test.ts exists and contains Jest tests for all EmployeeController handlers
All async errors in service and controller are caught and mapped to appropriate HTTP responses (GP-006)
All controller inputs are validated with Zod schemas before processing (GP-003)
All routes enforce RBAC via requireRoles preHandler (GP-005)
No direct database access from controllers; all data access goes through IEmployeeService -> IEmployeeRepository (GP-001)

constraints: GP-001: Repository pattern – all database access goes through repository interfaces (IEmployeeRepository)
GP-003: Input validation – validate all inputs at API boundaries using Zod schemas before processing
GP-005: RBAC enforcement – all API endpoints enforce role-based access control via requireRoles middleware
GP-006: Error handling – no unhandled promise rejections; all async errors caught and mapped to HTTP responses
GP-004: No sensitive data in logs – never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data (general constraint)
outOfScope: Any state-changing operations (create, update, delete) on Employee
Audit record creation (GP-002 not triggered in this phase)
Integration or E2E tests beyond the specified unit tests
